title: lepisorus eilophyllus
intro: Lepisorus eilophyllus, also known as the Chinese ladder fern, is a type of plant species belonging to the fern family (Polypodiaceae). Traditionally, Lepisorus eilophyllus has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and improving cardiovascular health. Lepisorus eilophyllus is often used in herbal preparations such as teas and infusions, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
